rules.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; HarmonyOS; Mobile) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 ComicReaderHarmony/RuleBot

rules.name: 开心漫公开访问源

rules.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.6099.230 Mobile Safari/537.36
